category_sources: Official Dhall documentation describes Dhall as a programmable configuration language.
source_facts.description says it is an interpreter for the Dhall language.
display_name_sources: Official homepage is dhall-lang.org and official docs title the project Dhall.
docs_sources: Official dhall-haskell package README links to full Dhall documentation.
Official docs domain docs.dhall-lang.org is the dedicated documentation site.
source_facts.homepage is the official Dhall homepage.
repo_sources: Official dhall-haskell README lists the dhall package and links package documentation.
source_facts.source-archive is the Hackage dhall package implemented in dhall-haskell.
tags_sources: Official docs describe Dhall's configuration-language purpose.
